title: 3PCS 180cm Artificial Silk Cherry Blossom Garland Vines Hanging Vine Garland Artificial Flowers for Outdoor Indoor Wedding Wall Badroom Decoration (Pink, White)
features: 【Quantity and Size】There are 3 packs artificial cherry flower garland in our package. One garland total length 180cm. Rose flower head about 5cm diameter.
【Durable and Reusable】The cherry flowers and leaves are made of fine fabric, the stems are made of pvc.

【Easy to Use and DIY】The branches of flower garland have high softness and can be bent at will as needed, also can be DIY designed. The flexible wire vine also easy to bend or cut, easy for you to create a unique decor, and easy to install.

【Perfect Decoration for Home or Wedding】The artificial cherry blossoms flowers garland is suitable for home,garden,wedding parties, wedding arches, show windows, shop, restaurant, office, flower basket, party, celebration, aisle, stairway, fences and many other occasions, improve the quality of indoor and outdoor decoration, and add more romantic atmosphere to you .
【Tips 】Artificial flowers may be squeezed and deformed in transit, you may adjust the branches to the most natural state after receiving it.
